title: humboldtia unijuga var. unijuga
intro: Humboldtia unijuga var. unijuga, also known as the "Saraca" or "Saraca asoka," is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, recognized by its unique flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
